items.current_decision_type: typed projection helper for host tool, permission grant, admission, autonomy, resident boundary, and outbound conversation
items.side_effect: none directly; intended to authorize prepare/execute/send decisions
items.durable_trace_presence: not stored by a dedicated authority store before this work; only embedded where caller stores another record
items.stale_target_behavior: outbound conversation projection can fail closed when target_binding_ref or channel_policy_ref mismatches current target
items.surface_redaction_behavior: does not itself project normal user redaction; relies on PersonalAgentNormalSurfaceProjection and companion projection callers
items.risk: high: contract exists but production caller paths can still make delivery/callback/notification decisions without recording a shared authority decision

items.current_decision_type: typed PersonalAgent SituationFrame and InterventionDecision for chat route/tool/task decisions
items.side_effect: assistant reply, task/tool path depending on route
items.durable_trace_presence: PersonalAgentRuntimeStore records SituationFrame, InitiativeEvent, TaskCandidate, CapabilityRegistryDecision, InterventionDecision
items.stale_target_behavior: reply target and session state are represented in cognition/runtime refs; stale rejection is covered in gateway/replay lanes but not a single authority vocabulary
items.surface_redaction_behavior: normal chat status paths hide raw trace/evidence refs unless diagnostic mode is explicit
items.risk: medium: core chat path is typed, but delivery authority is separate from send/notify authority

items.caller_path: src/interface/tui/* and chat runner shared paths
items.durable_trace_presence: depends on underlying chat/runtime-control trace, not TUI-specific authority rows
items.stale_target_behavior: approval entrypoints rely on approval/runtime stores; stale UI target rejection is not represented as ExecutionAuthorityDecision
items.surface_redaction_behavior: normal TUI-adjacent display uses user-facing projection helpers; diagnostic paths are explicit
items.risk: medium: projection-only boundary is implicit rather than encoded in a common authority surface class

items.current_decision_type: typed channel access and route policy before gateway dispatch
items.side_effect: Telegram typing, progress, final message send
items.durable_trace_presence: channel timing/health is stored; chat turn trace is produced downstream
items.stale_target_behavior: conversation route uses channel context; no shared ExecutionAuthorityDecision for message send
items.surface_redaction_behavior: NonTuiDisplayProjector and channel display policy shape normal output
items.risk: medium: access is typed, but send authority and normal-surface redaction are not summarized in authority decision rows

semantic_shortcuts.assessment: acceptable deterministic protocol grammar, not freeform intent classification

items.current_decision_type: adapter-local callback data parse plus PeerDeliveryRecord match
items.side_effect: callback ack, feedback ingestion, proactive policy event, prepared artifact send
items.durable_trace_presence: feedback projection and health rows persist successful feedback; stale/wrong callback rejection has no shared authority decision row
items.stale_target_behavior: telegramPeerDeliveryMatchesCallback rejects wrong chat/message/target binding before mutation
items.surface_redaction_behavior: callback ack is user-facing and does not expose raw refs
items.risk: high: stale rejection is correct but local to Telegram adapter and not connected to ExecutionAuthorityDecision

items.durable_trace_presence: PeerDeliveryRecord persists delivered/held/failed result; authority decision projection is test-only
items.stale_target_behavior: Telegram port checks target_binding_ref and channel_policy_ref before send
items.surface_redaction_behavior: OutboundConversationMessage carries only user-visible text/actions, no raw policy refs in normal payload
items.risk: high: direct side effect can occur after local check without a durable authority row written first

items.current_decision_type: typed attention admission, resident operation boundary, peer threshold, visibility policy, outbound target
items.side_effect: PeerDeliveryRecord, outbound conversation send, budget debit
items.durable_trace_presence: PeerInitiativeStore records candidates, deliveries, feedback projections; no dedicated interaction authority row
items.stale_target_behavior: delivery dedupes by delivery_id and target binding at port; callback stale handled separately
items.surface_redaction_behavior: surface delivery renders text only; tests assert raw visibility policy is not in message
items.risk: high: can_prepare/can_execute/can_send/can_notify are spread across boundary, threshold, visibility, and port checks

items.current_decision_type: config-driven batching, DND, cooldown, channel filter, plugin route decision
items.durable_trace_presence: optional personal-agent trace when personalAgentRuntime is injected; no ExecutionAuthorityDecision row
items.stale_target_behavior: no stale target binding vocabulary; no-route/filter/DND are suppressions
items.surface_redaction_behavior: normal notification content is report content; operator details depend on report origin
items.risk: high: suppress/notify decisions use different vocabulary from peer delivery and runtime-control authority

items.current_decision_type: typed pending approval and canonical permission wait plan
items.side_effect: approval state transition, permission wait plan resume/deny/expire/cancel
items.durable_trace_presence: ApprovalStore and PermissionWaitPlanStore persist request state and resume matching
items.stale_target_behavior: resumeApproved rejects mismatched or stale canonical plan before tool execution
items.surface_redaction_behavior: approval summaries are user-facing; diagnostic store rows expose exact refs
items.risk: medium: old approval rejection exists but is not projected into ExecutionAuthorityDecision vocabulary

items.side_effect: feedback record, peer feedback projection, proactive policy calibration
items.durable_trace_presence: feedback store and peer feedback projection rows persist accepted feedback; duplicate feedback is deduped
items.stale_target_behavior: relies on delivery/callback match before mutation
items.surface_redaction_behavior: ack text does not expose internal policy state
items.risk: medium: feedback authority depends on Telegram-local stale matching

items.side_effect: runtime operation mutation, companion state inspection/resume/control changes
items.durable_trace_presence: RuntimeOperationStore and PersonalAgentRuntimeStore trace runtime-control decisions
items.stale_target_behavior: runtime item staleness selectors block non-current authority before resume/action
items.surface_redaction_behavior: normal summaries omit hidden runtime facts; diagnostic commands can expose refs
items.risk: medium: runtime-control has strong typed authority but not yet connected to shared can_send/can_notify vocabulary

items.current_decision_type: typed correction ledger and user-facing memory inspect projection
items.side_effect: memory correction entry, replacement memory, quarantine/retraction/forget logical state
items.durable_trace_presence: ledger plus PersonalAgent relationship memory audits in caller paths
items.stale_target_behavior: corrected/superseded/retracted/forgotten memory is inactive for later recall and planning
items.risk: medium: memory withheld is typed but not part of ExecutionAuthorityDecision

items.current_decision_type: host policy, tool permission, permission manager, sanitizer, concurrency gate
items.side_effect: tool.call, capability execution records, personal-agent action_outcome trace
items.durable_trace_presence: personal-agent trace is recorded for admitted/blocked known tools; missing tool currently returns before trace
items.stale_target_behavior: host policy can fail closed on stale typed state epoch; permission wait plan rejects stale approval resume
items.surface_redaction_behavior: tool output projection handled by caller; action outcome trace is internal
items.risk: high: denied/missing tool path can end without action_outcome trace and must not fall back to direct adapter execution

items.caller_path: src/runtime/schedule/engine.ts and tests/harness replay/golden schedule traces
items.side_effect: scheduled tool/run execution, history records, wait resume
items.durable_trace_presence: schedule entries and history rows in control DB; replay fixtures assert no duplicate side effects
items.stale_target_behavior: same due idempotency dedupes retries; stale/mismatched resume rejected by schedule history
items.surface_redaction_behavior: schedule reports are projected through CLI/docs surfaces
items.risk: medium: idempotency is durable but not named as can_execute/can_notify authority

items.current_decision_type: attention admission, operation boundary, cognition guidance, resident activity persistence
items.side_effect: goal discovery, investigation, preemptive check, peer initiative, activity ledger
items.durable_trace_presence: resident activity and personal-agent trace for several paths
items.stale_target_behavior: preemptive goal validation rejects missing/stale/current-goal mismatches before action
items.surface_redaction_behavior: normal surface projection is separate; resident activity can include internal metadata for operator inspection
items.risk: high: resident action path spans multiple decision layers before side effects without one authority kernel record
